purpose: Description-selection cases with near misses for Comet, KVM, WOL, API, BIOS, and Tailscale vocabulary.

cases.query: Connect to the Comet on oob-pve01 and show me the console.
Use the GLKVM to reboot the hung Proxmox node.
Mount this Proxmox ISO on pve02 through the Comet and boot it.
Read the POST error on the machine attached to the Comet.

Record the console while this host boot-loops.
Check the Comet's Tailscale status and capabilities.
Use the Comet to enter BIOS and enable IOMMU.
Type this repair command into the recovery shell through the KVM.
Reboot my Proxmox node through its normal management API.
Review the comet_atx_power implementation in this repository.
Research the current GLKVM API endpoints.
Which KVM device should I buy for my homelab?
Analyze this HWiNFO log without operating the KVM.
